trigger_keywords: alcohol en la percepción de amargor del vino

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A wine contains a perceptible level of alcohol alongside bitter-tasting compounds.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Ethanol contributes warmth and can reinforce the sensory impact of bitterness rather than masking it.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Bitterness may be perceived as more intense, especially when alcohol feels elevated or out of balance.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Noticeable alcohol can intensify perceived bitterness by adding heat and reinforcing bitter sensations.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
